title: Press C to Zoom
description: A simple, lightweight zoom mod. Press C to zoom, scroll to adjust level, and enjoy precise aiming with dynamic sensitivity.
body: # Press C to Zoom A simple, lightweight, and responsive zoom mod for Minecraft. ## Features - **Smooth Zoom**: Press **C** (default) to zoom in with buttery smooth animations. - **Scroll Control**: While holding the zoom key, use the **Mouse Wheel** to adjust the zoom level (1x up to 100x). - **Dynamic Sensitivity**: Mouse sensitivity automatically scales with your zoom level, giving you precise control for aiming or observing. - **Client-Side Only**: This mod is entirely client-side. You can use it on any server! ## How to use 1. Install **Press C to Zoom**. 2. Launch Minecraft. 3. Hold **C** to zoom!
